✴️.name: Star of Dominion
✴️.runtime_role: Detect and seize flawed anchors, scaffold prefixes, generic fallback, double connectors, and repetition.

🪞.name: Mirror of Self-Seeing
🪞.runtime_role: Reflect the flawed output back as diagnostics so the build can see why it feels robotic or generic.

✨.name: Fire of Transmutation
✨.runtime_role: Rewrite dead scaffold language into direct, living, prompt-bound English.

📚.name: Living Grimoire
📚.runtime_role: Record before/after mutations so future turns can reuse the improved pathway.
